questions.answer: India does not have a part of the equator

questions.q: What is the significance of the 0° latitude?
questions.answer: The 0° latitude is also known as the equator.

questions.answer: Longitude is related to the measurement of east-west distance from the prime meridian.

questions.answer: Latitude is related to the measurement of north-south distance from the equator.

What is the significance of the prime meridian?
questions.answer: The prime meridian is the reference line from which all other longitudes are measured.
